## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes (no new errors)
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Change is focused on a single issue/feature
- [ ] Followed the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
